archive_data.question_text: सितंबर 2020 में, निम्नलिखित में से किसने भारत के चुनाव आयुक्त के रूप में शपथ ग्रहण किया है?

explanation.english: Rajiv Kumar took oath as Election Commissioner of India on 1 September 2020. He is a 1984 batch IAS officer of the Bihar/Jharkhand cadre who later became the Chief Election Commissioner in 2022.
explanation.tanglish: Rajeev Kumar 2020 September maasam 1-aam theediyil India Chunava Aayutha Aayogar aaga padaviyeranginaar. Avar 1984 batch IAS athikaari, avar thanner thalaivar Chunava Aayogar aagavum niraiverinar.

archive_data.question_text: निम्नलिखित में से किसे 'पृथ्वी, वायुमंडल, महासागर और अंतरिक्ष' वर्ग में 2020 का शांतिस्वरुप भटनागर विज्ञान और प्रौद्योगिकी पुरस्कार दिया गया?

explanation.english: Dr. Valsala Thampi was awarded the Shanti Swarup Bhatnagar Prize 2020 in the Earth, Atmosphere, Ocean and Space Sciences category for her contributions to hydrology and water resources management.
explanation.tanglish: Dr. Valsala Thampi 2020-aam aandil Shanti Swarup Bhatnagar parisu Boomi, Vayumandal, Kadalantharam, Anthariksha saarangathirkul award adainthaargal. Avar neerkalaiviyal matrum thanni varam patri seitha sinthanaigalukku indha parisu kidaithathu.

archive_data.question_text: जीका वायरस रोग मुख्य रूप से ______ द्वारा संक्रमित वायरस के कारण होता है।

explanation.english: Zika virus disease is primarily transmitted to humans through the bite of infected Aedes mosquitoes, particularly Aedes aegypti and Aedes albopictus species. These mosquitoes also transmit dengue and chikungunya viruses.
explanation.tanglish: Zika virus disease mukkiyamaga manitharukku Aedes mosquito kadithathal paravorum, special aa Aedes aegypti matrum Aedes albopictus pugaiyai mosquitoes vazhi. Ithu dengue matrum chikungunya virus vum paravee paduthum.
